content.speakerText: Can you set up the projector and mic for us?
content.speakerTextCn: 能帮我们安排投影仪和话筒吗？

options.text: Already on it — projector, mic, and Wi-Fi covered.
Can you turn off the lights?

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了设备需求并确认了多个设备（投影、话筒、Wi-Fi），符合主动确认的场景。其他选项：A是关于笔记本，与投影和话筒无关；C是取消会议，完全偏离主题；D是环境请求，不回应设备需求。

content.speakerText: Do you have Zoom setup ready?

options.text: We only have Teams — is that okay?
I need coffee before the meeting.

content.explanation: 正确答案直接回应了平台兼容性问题，提供替代方案并征询对方意见，符合职场沟通的灵活性。其他选项：B是无关需求；C是设备故障，未解决平台问题；D是推迟会议，未解决技术确认需求。

content.speakerText: Will we need a screen for the presentation?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们需要屏幕来做演示吗？

options.text: Yes, we’ve booked a large LED screen and a wireless presenter.
I’m not sure what time the meeting starts.
Can we order pizza for lunch?

content.explanation: 正确答案明确确认了演示设备（LED屏幕和无线演示器），直接回应了设备需求。其他选项：B是关于时间，C是餐饮，D是网络问题，均未回应是否需要演示屏幕的核心问题。

content.template: We’ve got the projector, but no ___ — can you bring your own?
content.hint: 这是会议中最常见的需要自带的设备之一，常与投影仪并列提及
content.knowledgePoint: 设备名词搭配（投影仪与话筒）

content.template: The room’s got ___-ready monitors and cameras.
content.hint: 这是视频会议平台的专用表达，表示设备已适配该平台

content.template: I’ll ___ a laptop and HDMI cable for the presentation.
content.hint: 在职场中，表示‘准备/安排’设备常用动词

content.speakerText: Can you set up the projector and mic for us?
content.speakerTextCn: 能帮我们安排投影仪和话筒吗？
expectedAnswers: Already on it — projector, mic, and Wi-Fi are all set.
Sure, I’ll make sure everything’s ready before the meeting.
We have the projector, but we’ll need you to bring a mic — is that okay?
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确回应了投影仪和话筒的准备状态
是否使用了场景关键词如 projector, mic, set up
表达是否自然、符合职场口语习惯

content.speakerText: Do you have Zoom setup ready?
expectedAnswers: Yes, the room has Zoom-ready monitors and built-in cameras.
We only have Teams, but I can install Zoom on a laptop if needed.
I’ll get a laptop with Zoom installed and tested before the meeting.
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确回应了Zoom设备准备情况
是否使用了关键词如 Zoom-ready, laptop, installed
是否提供了解决方案或替代方案，体现主动性

content.speakerText: We’re presenting tomorrow — do we need anything special for the tech setup?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们明天要演示，技术设备上需要特别准备什么吗？
expectedAnswers: Just a screen and a wireless presenter — we’ve got those covered.
We’ll need an HDMI cable and a backup laptop in case the main one fails.
Could you check if the room has a sound system too? We’ll need speakers for the audio.
evaluationCriteria: 是否识别并回应了演示场景的核心设备需求
是否使用了至少两个场景关键词（如 screen, presenter, HDMI, speakers）
表达是否清晰、有逻辑，是否主动提出潜在需求
